title: Cauldron Recipes
description: Adds datapack recipes to the cauldron.
body:
This mod provides cauldrons with a data pack recipe system. This allows mods and servers to add new recipes to the vanilla cauldrons. This mod also includes a few recipes for vanilla items as well. Example recipe files can be found here.

Included recipes

  • Torch / Redstone Torch -> Stick
  • Sticky Piston -> Piston
  • Concrete Powder -> Concrete
  • Lava Bucket -> Obsidian
  • Dyed Bed -> White Bed
  • Dyed Carpet -> White Carpet
  • Dyed Wool -> White Wool
